summary: Approved: [ART-CHARTER] goal: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. [ART-DATA] EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91; family-disjoint train/validation. [ART-METRIC] primary metric macro AUROC, statistical unit protein family; success is family-level. [ART-SEEDS] formal seeds 7, 21, 42; retain failed seeds. [ART-BASELINE] ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee; bind comparisons to commit/configuration. [ART-GOVERNANCE] 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protect data/raw; stop at budget exhaustion or more than 2 NaN failures. Deprecated/rejected: EnzymeBench v2, temporary CSV, seed 13, seed-42-only scripts, accuracy/micro F1/per-protein/0.75, ESM2-MLP, random forest, generation/docking, 80 GPU-hours/8xH100, and deleting failed runs [ART-REJECTED-METRIC][ART-REJECTED-SEEDS][ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE][ART-REJECTED-SCOPE].
